title: Stabilize dependency updates before release
goal: Keep the pre-release runtime and dependency update surface predictable after the first Dependabot wave.
scope: Align the production web Docker image with the Node LTS version used by CI.
Prevent broad pre-release major updates from npm, GitHub Actions, Terraform, and the web Node image.
Keep local review worktrees out of git status.
verification: Dependabot configuration parses as valid YAML.
Web Dockerfile uses Node 22 in deps, builder, and runner stages.
Git status no longer shows local .worktrees review artifacts.
completed_notes: Pinned apps/web Docker stages back to node:22-alpine to match CI and avoid a non-LTS production runtime jump.
Added Dependabot ignore rules for semver-major updates on the highest-risk ecosystems before initial release.
Ignored local .worktrees directories used for PR review.
